## Goal

What workflow should this improve?

## Proposed Scope

What should change in the CLI, docs, runner, or reports?

## Safety Notes

Does this involve generated media, private identity assets, model artifacts, or
cloud credentials? If yes, describe how they stay outside git.

## Validation

How should this be tested?
